close_reason: Added Demux.Server.push call after successful WAL write in Shale push handler
description:
After successful WAL write in push handler:
- Call Demux.push(state.demux, version, transaction)
- This is async (cast), won't block commit response

Test: After push succeeds, Demux receives the transaction.
title: Shale: push transactions to Demux after WAL commit
